name: Baking Powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cream of tartar and baking soda in a small bowl.
2. If storing, add the cornstarch to prevent moisture absorption.
3. Use immediately or store for up to one month.
4. For double-acting baking powder, use twice the amount of this single-acting recipe.
5. To test if your baking powder is active, stir 1 teaspoon into 1/3 cup hot water. The mixture should bubble vigorously.
Note: Measure ingredients using teaspoons as needed.
